name: Sweet & Sour Red Cabbage (Little)
recipeInstructions:
1. Shred the cabbage and steam over rapidly boiling water for 10 minutes, or until crisp-tender.
2. Remove from heat thoroughly.
3. Dissolve cornstarch in water; add remaining ingredients.
4. Cook over medium heat until slightly thickened.
5. Place this dish with either a hot or cold meat serving.
NOTE: This recipe is provided through the courtesy of Sweet Lite Fructose.
Food Exchange per servings: 1/2 FRUIT EXCHANGE + 1 VEGETABLE EXCHANGE
Cal: 45
Source: Recipes for Diabetics by Billie Little (1985 version)
